variables.name: gsl_bst_avl
variables.code:
gsl_bst_avl : access constant gsl_bst_type
with
   Import        => True,
   Convention    => C,
   External_Name => "gsl_bst_avl";

variables.name: gsl_bst_rb
variables.code:
gsl_bst_rb : access constant gsl_bst_type
with
   Import        => True,
   Convention    => C,
   External_Name => "gsl_bst_rb";
